title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an AI orchestration framework that triggers coding workflows from Jira tickets, GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord. A Jira adapter enables tickets to automatically spawn dedicated AI conversations that can run bug-fix and pull-request workflows. Each ticket maintains a persistent conversation state within the system.
